prompt: which slice 1 issue is the highest priority to pick up right now, and why? just tell me your choice, don't start it yet

assertions.name: cites_unblocks_23_dependency
assertions.text: Reasoning explicitly notes #23 is blocked by / depends on #17 and prefers the unblocker.

assertions.name: explains_tier_priority
assertions.text: Explicitly explains the priority ordering (bug > enhancement > future-enhancement) and which tier is the top occupied one.

assertions.name: honors_dont_start_yet
assertions.text: Respects 'don't start it yet' — reports the choice without beginning implementation (no branches/PRs/to-implementation).
